Bash(.venv/bin/python3 -c "
import sys; sys.path.insert\(0, '.'\)
from app.main import app
from fastapi.testclient import TestClient
client = TestClient\(app\)
r = client.get\('/health'\)
print\('health:', r.json\(\)\)
r2 = client.get\('/stocks/rankings?limit=3'\)
data = r2.json\(\)
print\('top 3 stocks:', [s['symbol'] for s in data['data']]\)
r3 = client.get\('/memecoins/rankings?limit=3'\)
print\('top 3 coins:', [c['symbol'] for c in r3.json\(\)['data']]\)
r4 = client.get\('/polymarket/signals?limit=3'\)
print\('polymarket signals:', len\(r4.json\(\)['data']\)\)
print\('All API routes OK'\)
")
